title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Anthropic released guidance on building agent harnesses for Claude Code in large codebases, emphasizing that the surrounding context, config, and tooling matter more than the model itself. Cole Medin built a complete example harness called the AI Layer, including CLAUDE.md hierarchies, self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP, subagents, and plugins.
